ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "cin" TEXT /* Corporate Identification Number (CIN) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "registration_number" INTEGER /* Registration number assigned by the authority */,
  "year_of_registration" INTEGER /* Year the company was registered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the company (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Primary contact email of the company */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Primary contact phone number of the company */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax identification number of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "registered_capital" TEXT /* Registered capital of the company */,
  "legal_representative" TEXT /* Name of the legal representative */,
  "last_audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last compliance audit */,
  "next_audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled compliance audit */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary industry the company belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business activity */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company performing the activity */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the business activity */,
  "activity_type" INTEGER /* Type of the business activity (e.g., Manufacturing, Wholesale) */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the activity belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the activity */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the activity */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the activity (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the activity is performed */,
  "responsible_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user responsible for the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_responsible_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("responsible_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_activity_type FOREIGN KEY ("activity_type") REFERENCES activity_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "regulatory_requirements" TEXT /* Regulatory requirements for the industry */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the industry information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regulator, company admin, auditor) */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the user belongs to (if applicable) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the last activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user information was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company being audited */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the compliance audit */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Compliance status (e.g., Compliant, Non-Compliant) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments from the audit */,
  "auditor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the auditor who performed the audit */,
  "audit_type" TEXT /* Type of the audit (e.g., annual, special) */,
  "reported_issues" TEXT /* List of issues reported during the audit */,
  "remediation_plan" TEXT /* Remediation plan for non-compliance issues */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for follow-up on non-compliance issues */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_records_auditor_id FOREIGN KEY ("auditor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_records_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent activity type (for hierarchical activity types) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the activity type information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_types_parent_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_type_id") REFERENCES activity_types ("type_id")
)
